data_option.note: Assignment timeout in minutes if assigned agent is not working on it. Ticket will be shown as unassigend.

options.new_ticket: do not reopen ticket but create new ticket
options.new_ticket_after_certain_time: do not reopen ticket after certain time but create new ticket

data_option.note: Follow-up for closed ticket possible or not.

Assign follow-up to latest agent again.
A group's email address determines which address should be used for outgoing mails, e.g. when an agent is composing an email or a trigger is sending an auto-reply.
Customers in the organization can view each other's items.
Assign users based on user domain.
